narrative:
Noble Township has 1,331 registered voters, with 49.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.1 percentage points.
